app.name: Ghost Brain
app.bootOk: All set — the app is up.
login.title: Ghost Brain
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue
settings.title: Settings
settings.intro: Tune the rhythm of your second brain. Nothing here is final — change it whenever you like.
settings.ai.title: AI assistant
settings.ai.mode.help: In copy/paste mode, the app builds the prompt and you paste it into your own ChatGPT/Claude — no key, no cost, and the AI never touches your data.
settings.language.help: Interface language. Your content stays exactly as you wrote it.
settings.timezone.help: Defines what "today" is: agenda, calendar, day closing and progress all use this zone.
settings.reviewWeekday.help: Weekday new captures are scheduled to for review.
settings.recapWeekday.help: Which day the weekly recap week begins on.
settings.times.help: Reserved for reminders — not used by the app yet.
recaps.title: Recaps
recaps.create.title: New recap
search.title: Search
command.title: Command palette
command.switcher.title: Go to…
command.switcher.placeholder: Go to a note or resource…
command.switcher.hint: Type to search notes and resources.
tour.welcome.title: Welcome to your second brain
tour.welcome.body: A place to capture ideas friction-free, review them calmly, and turn what matters into knowledge. Let me show you the essentials in a minute.
tour.capture.title: Capture friction-free
tour.capture.body: Drop any idea here — one click (or Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+C) and it's out of your head. Triage comes later.
tour.today.title: Today is your starting point
tour.today.body: Your daily ritual, goals, pending captures, and study reviews — all in one place.
tour.review.title: Review your inbox
tour.review.body: Here you triage what you captured: turn it into a note, a library resource, or a goal. Inbox zero is a win.
tour.calendar.title: See your rhythm over time
tour.calendar.body: Calendar and recaps show what you've done and help you close the day.
tour.library.title: Your knowledge lives here
tour.library.body: Notes, library, goals, study, and publications — browse these sections.
tour.labels.title: Organize with labels
tour.labels.body: Create and manage labels to tag and refind everything. Click to open management.
tour.settings.title: Tune it your way
tour.settings.body: Language, timezone, ritual times, and more. Nothing is final — change it whenever.
tour.end.title: That's it! Enjoy.
tour.end.body: Reopen this guide anytime from the ? icon up top or the command palette (Ctrl/Cmd+P).
agenda.greeting.subtitle: Every day starts fresh
capture.queued: Saved offline — will sync when back
notes.title: Notes
notes.empty: No notes yet. Tap New to start.
notes.deleteConfirm.title: Delete this note?
notes.deleteConfirm.body: The note leaves your list. This can't be undone for now.
notes.chooseResource.help: A study note is always tied to a resource in your library.
notes.noResources: You don't have any resources in your library yet.
labels.title: Labels
labels.empty: No labels yet. Create the first one.
labels.archiveBlocked: Can't archive: the label is in use or has active children.
labels.field.name: Name
labels.pickEmpty: No labels created yet (create them via the top icon).
editor.placeholder.reflection: How was the day? What stayed?
editor.placeholder.note: An idea, an observation, a thought…
editor.questions.title: Suggested questions
editor.questions.empty: No questions for this note's labels.
editor.attach.title: Attachments
editor.attach.noNote: Write something and save before attaching.
editor.labels.title: Labels for this note
editor.labels.noNote: Write something and save before tagging.
review.title: Review
common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
library.comingSoonBody: Your study notes, annotations and references will live here.
library.create.title: New resource
library.edit.title: Edit resource
library.sort.label: Sort
library.sort.title: Title (A–Z)
resource.notes.title: Study notes
resource.notes.empty: No study notes yet. Create the first from here.
resource.studyItems.title: Study items
resource.field.title: Title
resource.field.author: Author
resource.highlights.title: Highlights
resource.highlights.empty: No highlights yet. Add the first one here.
highlight.field.quotePlaceholder: Paste or type what you highlighted
highlight.field.commentPlaceholder: What does this passage tell you?
settings.highlightColors.title: Highlight colors
settings.highlightColors.help: Each color carries your own meaning. Rename, recolor, add or remove. A color in use cannot be removed.
settings.highlightColors.name: Meaning
settings.highlightColors.inUse_one: Used by {{count}} highlight — recolor it before removing.
settings.highlightColors.inUse_other: Used by {{count}} highlights — recolor them before removing.
goals.title: Goals
goals.create.title: New goal
goals.edit.title: Edit goal
goals.edit.typeLocked: Type can't be changed — create a new goal to change it.
goals.archive.error: Couldn't archive. If it's an umbrella, archive its active children first.
goals.deleteConfirm.title: Delete this goal?
goals.deleteConfirm.body: This goal was never done and will be removed for good. This can't be undone.
goals.skip.reasonLabel: What got in the way? (no guilt)
goals.action.error: Couldn't log that right now. Try again.
goals.progress.label: {{percent}}% done
goal.field.title: Title
dayClosing.title: Close the day
dayClosing.subtitle: A moment to look back — no scorekeeping.
dayClosing.invitation: If you'd like, there's still time
dayClosing.closed.title: Day closed
assistant.comingSoonBody: A helper to review and connect your ideas arrives in a later chapter.
calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.detail.empty: Pick a day to see its details.
study.title: Study
study.create.title: New study item
study.edit.title: Edit study item
study.field.title: Title
study.fichamento.blindHint: Close the book and your notes. Reconstruct from memory — the gain is in the clash between what you thought you remembered and what the text said.
study.detail.consolidatedHint: Consolidated — you've reviewed it all three times. We won't nag anymore; the item stays here for reference.
study.detail.notDueHint: No review due today. You can still review it if you'd like.
review.tryRecall.body: Close the book and reconstruct from memory: thesis, arguments, examples. The gain is in the clash between what you thought you remembered and what the text actually said.
review.context.where: Where in the argument did it appear?
review.context.against: Whom was the author arguing against?
publish.sheet.title: Turn this into a publication?
publish.invite: Teaching is the best way to retain. If you'd like, turn this into a draft — no pressure, it stays among your ideas until you decide.
publish.format.label: Which format?
publish.title: Publications
publish.empty: No publications yet. When something you studied is worth teaching, turn it into a draft.
publish.edit.title: Edit publication
publish.field.title: Title
publish.create.title: Untitled publication
publish.detail.draftHint: The draft is a note. Write it in the editor whenever you like — no rush.
ai.pasteHint: Paste into your ChatGPT or Claude and bring the result back. The AI doesn't touch your data — zero cost, no key.
ai.paste.label: I pasted the result
ai.paste.hint: Review before saving — nothing is stored until you confirm.
ai.runError: Couldn't generate right now. Try copy/paste mode.
assistant.title: Assistant
assistant.intro: The AI is a mirror, not autopilot. Pick what you want to think through; the result comes back as a candidate for you to review — nothing is saved without your confirmation.
assistant.skillPicker: What do you want to do?
assistant.modeCheap: Copy/paste mode — zero cost, no key.
assistant.modeConnected: Connected mode — the AI runs on the server; the result is still a candidate.
assistant.candidateSaved: Candidate saved as a note. Review and edit freely.
assistant.field.title: Title
assistant.field.author: Author
assistant.field.sourceHint: Excerpts from the material to compare (optional)
agenda.reviews.empty: Nothing to review today. Well done!
agenda.goals.empty: No goals for today. Enjoy the space.
agenda.goals.skip.reasonTitle: It's okay to skip. What happened?
agenda.captures.hint: Full triage is coming soon — for now, just a look.
agenda.empty.allClear: All clear here. Breathe — the day is yours.
graph.empty: Your graph grows as you connect notes
graph.emptyBody: Mention one note inside another (with @) to create your first link.
shell.noTabs: No tabs open. Pick something from the explorer on the left.
notes.archiveConfirm.title: Archive this note?
notes.archiveConfirm.body: The note leaves your active list. You can restore it anytime.
notes.deleteBlocked: Can't delete: other notes link to it, it has attachments, or it's a study/draft note.
resources.archiveConfirm.title: Archive this resource?
resources.archiveConfirm.body: The resource leaves your active library. You can restore it later.
resources.deleteConfirm.title: Delete this resource for good?
resources.deleteConfirm.body: The resource will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
resources.deleteBlocked: Can't delete: notes or study items are linked to this resource.
study.archiveConfirm.title: Archive this study item?
study.archiveConfirm.body: The item leaves your active list. You can restore it later.
study.deleteConfirm.title: Delete this study item for good?
study.deleteConfirm.body: The item will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
study.deleteBlocked: Can't delete: the item has recall history.
publications.archiveConfirm.title: Archive this publication?
publications.archiveConfirm.body: The publication leaves your active pipeline. You can restore it later.
publications.deleteConfirm.title: Delete this publication for good?
publications.deleteConfirm.body: The publication will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
goals.archiveConfirm.title: Archive this goal?
goals.archiveConfirm.body: The goal leaves your active lists. You can restore it later.
goals.deleteBlocked: Can't delete: the goal has children or completion history.
labels.archiveConfirm.title: Archive this label?
labels.archiveConfirm.body: The label leaves active lists. You can restore it later.
labels.deleteConfirm.title: Delete this label for good?
labels.deleteConfirm.body: The label will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
labels.deleteBlocked: Can't delete: the label is in use or has active children.
capture.archiveConfirm.title: Archive this capture?
capture.archiveConfirm.body: The capture leaves the review queue. You can restore it later.
capture.deleteConfirm.title: Delete this capture for good?
capture.deleteConfirm.body: The capture will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
capture.deleteBlocked: Can't delete: the capture has attachments.
